prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划缩招（位次数字减小约189名）、本省考生总数大 幅增长（竞争加剧推高位次数字）、核心工科专业社会热度高（吸引更多考生报考）等多重因素，缩招的缓解效应被考生增加和热度上升所抵消，预计2026年最低录取位次在2025 年3813名基础上小幅后移（位次数字增大）；预测最低位次约3674名，区间3174–4174名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science/physics category was approximately 34565 → 5561 → 4606 → 4340 → 3813. In 2021, the ranking was abnormally high due to special types such as Sino-foreign cooperation. Since 2022, it has returned to a normal range and has been moving forward year by year (ranking number decreasing), with a cumulative forward movement of about 748 places in the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 3813. The provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 95 in 2021, 98 in 2022, 96 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 97 in 2025, generally stable in the 95–98 range. The 2026 plan is 89, a decrease of 8 from 2025 (a reduction of about 8.2%). The reduction in enrollment quotas theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 ranked 41st (2021: 40th → 2022: 40th → 2023: 43rd → 2024: 41st → 2025: 42nd → 2026: 41st), stable in the 40–43 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly related to historical laboratory safety incidents, but the incidents are relatively old and have limited impact on current application psychology. Douyin popularity ranking 45th (relatively hot), with some exposure on short video platforms. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. System Science A+ (national top), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, a total of 6 A- and above disciplines, with outstanding disciplinary strength among 211 universities, strong appeal to information and transportation candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication (2024 high-heat recommendation, slight warming), Electrical Engineering and Automation (high-heat recommendation, slight warming), Computer Science (recommended but significantly cooling) — BJTU's core enrollment majors are all high-heat or recommended directions, with high application popularity. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 377,900 (an increase of about 32.3% from 285,700 in 2025). Estimated physics category candidates about 229,000 based on historical proportion, competition significantly intensified. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing (not in the province), enrolling about 95–97 students in Yunnan science/physics category, accounting for a small proportion of the university's total national enrollment, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment. Beijing, as a first-tier city, still has strong regional appeal to candidates from the southwest.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2026 enrollment plan reduction (ranking number decreases by about 189), a significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province (competition intensifies pushing ranking number up), and high social popularity of core engineering majors (attracting more candidates), the easing effect of the enrollment reduction is offset by the increase in candidates and rising popularity. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move back (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 3813. Predicted minimum ranking approximately 3674, range 3174–4174.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<3174), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1182 → 1119 → 1420 → 1206 → 1046, fluctuating within the range of 1046–1420. The baseline for 2025 is about 1046 (best in recent years). The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 8 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 9 students in 2024–2025, and remains at 9 students for 2026, consistent with 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked 41st in the 2026 Soft Science Ranking, belonging to the top tier of 211 universities. Although liberal arts are not its main strength, the platform advantages are significant. The reputation in 2026 is slightly negative (historical laboratory safety incident), but its impact on liberal arts admissions is limited. Douyin popularity ranking is 45th (relatively popular), with moderate overall attention. Management Science and Engineering is rated A- (related to the Economics and Management Pilot Class), and Systems Science is rated A+ (supporting basic disciplines). Law has no separate rating, but Beijing Jiaotong University's law program has a certain recognition in the industry. In 2024, law was assessed as divergent and watchful (somewhat popular but highly competitive), while economics and management were also divergent and watchful. The total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is approximately 377,900, with an estimated 148,600 history category examinees (an increase of about 32.2% from 112,400 in 2025), significantly intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, with only 2 liberal arts admission majors (Law and Liberal Arts Pilot Class). The number of slots is small but competition is concentrated. The Beijing location still holds strong appeal for liberal arts examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a stable enrollment plan, a significant increase in the number of history category examinees in the province (intensifying competition pushing ranking numbers higher), and the divergent social popularity of liberal arts majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking for 2026 will slightly shift backward (ranking number increases) from the 2025 baseline of 1046. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1061, with a range of 902–1220.
